decomposition.label: Total Statement of Claim
decomposition.note: Sum across 2 DFCCIL claims in portfolio

decomposition.label: Arbitration win probability
decomposition.note: Expert judgment based on DFCCIL historical outcomes; 70% probability TATA wins first arbitration

decomposition.label: Expected quantum given win
decomposition.note: 5-band quantum distribution: 70% chance of 80-100% SOC, 15% chance of 0-20% SOC, remainder spread across middle bands

decomposition.label: Court survival given arb win
decomposition.note: Empirical from MC: probability award survives post-arb court challenges (Domestic: S.34→S.37→SLP; SIAC: HC→COA). Based on 10,000 arb-won paths.

decomposition.label: Recovery via re-arbitration path
decomposition.note: Additional value from RESTART paths: arb_lose → court reverses adverse award → fresh re-arbitration (P=70%) → survive courts. Adds ₹71.6 Cr to expected recovery.

decomposition.label: Expected amount collected
decomposition.note: Total expected collection = direct path (₹44.0 Cr) + RESTART contribution (₹71.6 Cr). MC average over 5,000 paths.

decomposition.label: Minus expected legal costs
decomposition.note: All-stage legal costs: tribunal fees, counsel, DAB, arbitration, court challenges. Average ₹6.0 Cr per claim.
